title: 13th Birthday Party Decorations Purple Pink - Happy 13th Birthday Decoration for Girls Includes Happy Birthday Banner, Balloons,Cake Topper and Butterfly Stickers for Girls Her Birthday Party Supplies

【Unique Design】These 13th birthday decorations for girls are themed around a happy 13th birthday, adopting pink and purple as the main colors. They are suitable for decorating both indoor and outdoor birthday parties, offering great visual appeal and adding a joyful atmosphere to your 13th birthday celebration.

【High Quality Materials】Happy Birthday banners, circle dot paper garland, butterfly stickers, cake topper are made of high-quality paper, cardstock in nice and bright colors, Balloons Made of high-quality natural latex, which is durable, not easy to explod and safe for kids.

【Wide Range of Usage】Our 13th Birthday Decoration Set is loved by Girls. Whether it's a party, children's birthday party or all kinds of family celebrations, you can use our party decorations to spice up the atmosphere and bring back good memories.

【Easy to Use】The Happy Birthday banner requires assembly. You can quickly string it together using the ribbon and plastic needle we provide. Before inflating the balloons, rub them with your clothes or hair to make the confetti stick to the balloons. Note: Do not overinflate the balloons.

【100% Quality Guarantee】We guarantee the quality of our products. If you have any questions about the birthday balloon set, please feel free to contact us. We will provide you with a satisfactory response within 24 hours.
